projectDescription: AI-powered real estate intelligence platform that delivers on-demand professional appraisals, financial analysis, projections, renderings, and market studies for any property in Mexico.
keyFeatures: On-demand professional property appraisals (dictámenes) covering land use, zoning, and value
Financial analysis including ROI, cash flow, and market comparables
5- and 10-year financial projections for buy, sell, and rental scenarios
Renderings and visual context including street view and project visualizations
Market studies with zone pricing, demand, trends, and competitive intelligence
320+ variables analyzed per property including seismic risk, walkability, solar potential
Real-time data sourced live at the moment of each request
Custom proposals combining multiple services for a single project
publicApiSurface: Request form: name, email, phone/WhatsApp, property address, solution type, property type
Dictamen output: uso de suelo, COS/CUS, maximum height, transit distance, value/m², walkability score
Financial analysis output: ROI, cash flow, market comparables, zone profitability
Market study output: zone pricing statistics, demand, trends, competition
